hero.heading: We help small businesses grow.
hero.description: We create modern websites, online stores, and digital experiences that help businesses achieve real results.
home.servicesDescription: From websites to social media management — complete digital solutions for your business.
home.projectsDescription: Real projects built by real students — see what we've created.
home.ctaDescription: Let's discuss your ideas and turn them into a stunning digital experience.
about.heading: We Are BTA LAB
about.description: A digital innovation lab where students collaborate to build real-world digital products, websites, and software solutions — bridging the gap between education and industry.
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.description: To empower students with real-world experience by working on actual client projects under expert mentorship, creating a bridge between academic learning and industry demands.
about.vision.title: Our Vision
about.vision.description: To become a leading digital innovation lab that sets the standard for student-industry collaboration, producing skilled professionals and outstanding digital solutions.
about.values.heading: What Drives Us
about.values.description: Our core principles guide every project we undertake and every relationship we build.
about.values.items.0.title: Innovation
about.values.items.0.description: We embrace creative thinking and push boundaries to deliver unique solutions.
about.values.items.1.title: Collaboration
about.values.items.1.description: Teamwork is at the heart of everything we do — learning from each other and growing together.
about.values.items.2.title: Quality
about.values.items.2.description: We hold ourselves to the highest standards, delivering work that exceeds expectations.
about.values.items.3.title: Growth
about.values.items.3.description: Continuous learning and improvement drive both our team and our projects forward.
about.journey.heading: How We Started
about.cta.heading: Let's Build Something Great
about.cta.description: Ready to collaborate? Whether you need a website, branding, or a digital product — we're here to help.
services.heading: What We Offer
services.description: Comprehensive digital services designed to help your business grow and succeed online.
services.addons.title: Additional Services
services.addons.description: Services to help you rank better on Google and start working with a technically sound setup.
services.cta.heading: Not Sure Where to Start?
services.cta.description: Contact us and we'll help you choose the right package for your needs.
portfolio.heading: Our Work
portfolio.description: A showcase of projects built by our team — from websites and e-commerce to branding and marketing.
team.heading: Meet the Team
team.description: A diverse group of talented students, designers, developers, and marketers working together to bring ideas to life.
team.join.heading: Join Our Team
team.join.description: We're always looking for passionate students to join BTA LAB. If you're eager to learn and build real projects, we want to hear from you.
contact.heading: Let's Create Something Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? Send us a message and we'll help you bring it to life.
contact.form.name: Full Name
contact.form.successDescription: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
footer.brandDescription: A digital innovation lab where students collaborate to build real-world solutions — bridging education and industry.
footer.company.title: Company
footer.info.title: Information
footer.services.title: Services
footer.contact.title: Contact
notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Let's get you back on track.
data.about.timeline.0.title: The Beginning
data.about.timeline.0.description: BTA LAB was founded with a vision to bridge the gap between academic learning and real-world industry experience.
data.about.timeline.1.title: First Projects
data.about.timeline.1.description: Our first cohort of students began working on real client projects, laying the foundation for our unique learning model.
data.about.timeline.2.title: Expansion
data.about.timeline.2.description: We expanded our team, added new services, and started collaborating with businesses across various industries.
data.about.timeline.3.title: Milestones
data.about.timeline.3.description: Reached 48+ completed projects, built a strong reputation, and received multiple industry recognitions.
data.about.timeline.4.title: Looking Ahead
data.about.timeline.4.description: Continuing to grow, innovate, and empower the next generation of digital professionals.
pricing.website.title: Website Development
pricing.website.description: Modern, fast, and fully responsive websites built with the latest technologies.
pricing.social.title: Social Media & Advertising Management
pricing.social.description: Complete social media management: content planning, professional design, post scheduling, targeted advertising, and results optimization.
pricing.social.note: Advertising budget is not included in the service fee and is paid separately by the client.
